reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the deterministic packet boundary; do not treat prepare-input as reviewer launch, LLM review, proof, eval planning, or claim mutation.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is deterministic packet-boundary behavior: prepare-input either emits review input without mutating or satisfying claims, or it does not.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by checked-in CLI and runtime tests: prepare-input emits `cautilus.claim_review_input.v1`, records a no-LLM/non-satisfaction packet notice, preserves unknown current labels, and leaves the source claims file unchanged.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing prepare-input packet shape, reviewer launch boundaries, skipped-claim policy, or evidence satisfaction semantics.
